Notice Of Motion For Determinating That The Settlement Between Pltf'S And X-Defts Was In Good Faith
Off Calendar Feb-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
CROSS-DEFENDANTS PAUL BARBAGELATA AND BARBAGELATA REALTY COMPANY'S Motion For Determinating That The Settlement Between Plaintiffs And Cross-Defendants Was In Good Faith is Granted. Given the evidence concerning the likelihood of liability, the likely allocation of any liability, and the absence of collusion, the objecting parties have not shown that the settlement is outside the ballpark under the Tech-Bilt factors. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM
